_comment: Paste this entry into .claude/plugins.json install[] array to wire e2m-mcp into cowork sessions.
name: e2m-mcp
comment: Envelope-to-mailbox MCP server. 7 tools: envelope_write, envelope_read, task_transition, mailbox_send, mailbox_recv, mailbox_ack, queue_status. Append-only JSONL per domain (design | engineering | product-management | data | sales | finance). Source: cowork/mcp/e2m-mcp/server.ts. Build: cd cowork/mcp/e2m-mcp && npm ci && npm run build.
